columns.name: AssessedForPolicies
columns.description: Whether an asset was assessed for policies

columns.name: AssessedForVulnerabilities
columns.description: Whether an asset was assessed for vulnerabilities

columns.name: AssetType
columns.description: The type of asset

columns.name: _BilledSize
columns.description: The record size in bytes

columns.name: CredentialAssessments
columns.description: The credential assessments for the asset

columns.name: CriticalVulnerabilities
columns.description: The count of critical vulnerability findings

columns.name: Exploits
columns.description: The count of known unique exploits that can be used to exploit vulnerabilities on the asset

columns.name: HostName
columns.description: The host name (local or FQDN)

columns.name: Id
columns.description: The asset identifier

columns.name: Ip
columns.description: The IPv4 or IPv6 address

columns.name: _IsBillable
columns.description: Specifies whether ingesting the data is billable. When _IsBillable isfalseingestion isn't billed to your Azure account

columns.name: LastAssessedForVulnerabilities
columns.description: The time at which an asset was assessed for vulnerabilities

columns.name: LastScanEnd
columns.description: The time at which the last scan of the asset ended

columns.name: LastScanStart
columns.description: The time at which the last scan of the asset started

columns.name: Mac
columns.description: The Media Access Control (MAC) address with format specification

columns.name: MalwareKits
columns.description: The count of known unique malware kits that can be used to attack vulnerabilities

columns.name: ModerateVulnerabilities
columns.description: The count of moderate vulnerability findings

columns.name: New
columns.description: Vulnerabilities that are new in the latest version (when comparison time is supplied)

columns.name: OsArchitecture
columns.description: The architecture of the operating system

columns.name: OsDescription
columns.description: The description of the operating system (containing vendor, family, product, version and architecture)

columns.name: OsFamily
columns.description: The family of the operating system

columns.name: OsName
columns.description: The name of the operating system

columns.name: OsSystemName
columns.description: A combination of vendor and family (with redundancies removed), suitable for grouping

columns.name: OsType
columns.description: The type of operating system

columns.name: OsVendor
columns.description: The vendor of the operating system

columns.name: OsVersion
columns.description: The version of the operating system

columns.name: Remediated
columns.description: Vulnerabilities that were remediated in the latest version (when comparison time is supplied)

columns.name: RiskScore
columns.description: The risk score (with criticality adjustments) of the asset

columns.name: Same
columns.description: Vulnerabilities that are the same between current and comparison time (when comparison time is supplied and includeSame is true)

columns.name: SevereVulnerabilities
columns.description: The count of severe vulnerability findings

columns.name: SourceSystem
columns.description: The type of agent the event was collected by. For example,OpsManagerfor Windows agent, either direct connect or Operations Manager,Linuxfor all Linux agents, orAzurefor Azure Diagnostics

columns.name: Tags
columns.description: The tags applied to the asset

columns.name: TenantId
columns.description: The Log Analytics workspace ID

columns.name: TimeGenerated
columns.description: The time the event was generated

columns.name: TotalVulnerabilities
columns.description: The total count of vulnerability findings

columns.name: Type
columns.description: The name of the table

columns.name: UniqueIdentifiers
columns.description: Unique identifiers found on the asset, such as hardware or operating system identifiers
